title: tenants — regulatory compliance
description: Regulatory regime × control × evidence per module. Each control has a stable `article` (or Trust Services Criterion) reference so auditors can cross-check. `evidence` points at the concrete artefact this module produces — a data file, a scheduled job, a DTO, or a downstream module. Aggregated by the compliance module for the enterprise-facing security whitepaper.

gdpr.description: General Data Protection Regulation. Applies whenever a tenant's users include EU / EEA data subjects.

controls.evidence: Tenant registration captures ToS acceptance timestamp on User creation (Auth module).
compliance module's DSAR orchestrator aggregates data-classes.json exportable fields per tenant.
IdentityPolicy@erase + compliance module's PurgeSubjectJob. retention.json declares erasureOnRequest for Identity + TenantContact.
subprocessors.json aggregated at repo root via `tenancy:snapshot-subprocessors`.
TenantContact table + kind=dpo entries + retention hold P7Y (retention.json).
TenantIntegration.config uses IntegrationConfig cast + KMS pointer (crypto-shredding on delete).
TenantException::crossTenantAccess() severity Alert routes to the security-audit channel + on-call. Runbook in compliance/runbooks/breach-notification.md (v2).
compliance/dpia/tenant-provisioning-with-minors.md — required for School / Academy business types.

uk_gdpr.description: UK GDPR mirrors EU GDPR post-Brexit. Same controls as `gdpr`.

controls.evidence: See gdpr regime.

coppa.description: Children's Online Privacy Protection Act. Applies to US tenants whose users include children under 13.

controls.evidence: Not owned by tenants — enforced by the athletes / user modules when a User is created with age < 13. Tenancy declares BusinessType.default_config to preselect the parental-consent flow for School / Academy.
notifications.json - GuardianConsentNotification (owned by future safeguarding module).

ferpa.description: Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act. US schools + universities receiving federal education funds.

controls.evidence: TenantContact kind=legal per school tenant captures the parental-consent form authority.
DPA template in compliance module lists Stackra as a 'school official under direct control'.
Owned by settings module — tenants stores the preference on TenantContact.address.country_code === 'US' + state === 'CA'.
compliance/notices/privacy-notice-us.md.

pci_dss.description: Tenancy does NOT touch payment card data. Card data is scoped to the Stripe Elements iframe — Stackra stays SAQ-A.

controls.evidence: No `card_number`, `cvv`, or PAN in any schema in this module. Enforced by data-classes.json.

wcag_2_2_aa.description: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines. Required by public-sector procurement (US Section 508 + EU EN 301 549).

controls.evidence: SDUI runtime enforces focus-ring on every Button + Toggle. Per-screen conformance recorded in future accessibility.json.
Branding.primary_color + Branding.background_color are contrast-checked at save time by the Branding form validator.
Tenant.provisioning.locale + Identity.locale drive the `<html lang>` attribute.

soc2_type2.description: SOC 2 Type II report required for enterprise deals over ~$50k ACV.

controls.evidence: policies.json + permissions.json — every mutation gated by a named ability + guard.
health.json + metrics.json; foundation aggregates and exposes.
feature-flags.json (rollout flags) + git PR review + module changelog.md — every change to a business feature ships behind a rollout flag.

iso_27001.description: ISMS certification — overlaps SOC 2 substantially. International enterprise buyers (EU, ME, APAC) request this.

controls.evidence: See CC6.1 above.
TenantIntegration.config encryption via KMS.
